entity.summary: Base-native concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange combining a Uniswap V3-style CLMM with vote-escrow and ve(3,3) incentive mechanisms.
entity.notes: HEI uses 2023-12-01 as a month-level first-operation marker. First-party material published during December 2023 describes an operating WETH/USDC liquidity pool, trader and liquidity-provider activity, and a pre-launch IFO period, while independent protocol metrics preserve Q4 2023 activity. This entity is the basex.fi protocol sourced by DefiLlama and is distinct from unrelated products using similar BaseX or BSX names.

events.title: BaseX entered verified public operation on Base
events.description: BaseX began operating its concentrated-liquidity exchange and liquidity-incentive system on Base during December 2023.
events.notes: The exact first trading day was not recovered. The date is normalized to the first day of the month in which first-party material documented active traders, liquidity providers, and pools and independent metrics record protocol activity.

evidence.title: Meet BaseX: The Base asset croXroads
evidence.notes: First-party introduction defines the Base-chain DEX and its concentrated-liquidity, vote-escrow, and ve(3,3) architecture.

evidence.title: Announcing BaseX BXT IFO Pre-Launch Season
evidence.notes: First-party pre-launch material refers to active trading-volume and liquidity-provider rankings and use of the WETH/USDC Gamma pool on BaseX.

evidence.title: BaseX documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation defines BaseX as a DEX and liquidity protocol on Base.

evidence.title: BaseX protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current metrics show non-zero Base TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX volume and preserve protocol activity beginning in Q4 2023.
